You are the final evaluator stage.

Evaluate:
1) QUESTION_TEXT_PREVIEW below (first 100 words of the canonical user question), and
2) your immediately previous assistant response in this same chat session.

Do not answer the question again.
Do not rewrite the prior response.
Return exactly one JSON object (no markdown, no prose, no code fences).

QUESTION_TEXT_PREVIEW:
{{QUESTION_TEXT_PREVIEW}}

Context:
job_id={{JOB_ID}}
question_id={{QUESTION_ID}}
run_id={{RUN_ID}}
branch_id={{BRANCH_ID}}
phase={{PHASE}}
judge_model={{JUDGE_MODEL}}
now_iso_utc={{NOW_ISO_UTC}}

Rules:
1) Treat QUESTION_TEXT_PREVIEW as a summary anchor only.
2) Score the immediately previous assistant response in this chat.
3) If no previous assistant response is available, return exactly:
{"error":"EVAL_CONTEXT_MISSING"}
4) Use 0.0-10.0 numeric scores.

Return this exact top-level structure and field names:
{
  "schema_version": "1.0",
  "object_type": "evaluation",
  "object_id": "eval_{{JOB_ID}}",
  "phase": {{PHASE}},
  "status": "complete",
  "created_at": "{{NOW_ISO_UTC}}",
  "updated_at": "{{NOW_ISO_UTC}}",
  "run_context": {
    "job_id": "{{JOB_ID}}",
    "question_id": "{{QUESTION_ID}}",
    "run_id": "{{RUN_ID}}",
    "branch_id": "{{BRANCH_ID}}",
    "research_id": null,
    "parent_object_id": "{{RESPONSE_OBJECT_ID}}",
    "root_object_id": "{{QUESTION_ID}}"
  },
  "content": {
    "question_text_preview": "{{QUESTION_TEXT_PREVIEW}}",
    "categorization": {
      "topic_short": "",
      "topic": "",
      "topics": [],
      "keywords": [],
      "summary": "",
      "language": "en",
      "domain": "",
      "subdomain": "",
      "sensitivity": "public",
      "recency_class": "stable"
    },
    "quality_flags": {
      "needs_web_verification": false,
      "missing_citations": false,
      "safety_or_policy_risk": false
    }
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": null,
    "topic_short": "",
    "topic": "",
    "topics": [],
    "keywords": [],
    "summary": "",
    "query_variants": [],
    "language": "en",
    "domain": "",
    "subdomain": "",
    "sensitivity": "public",
    "recency_class": "stable"
  },
  "scores": [
    {
      "score_event_id": "score_evt_{{JOB_ID}}",
      "score_profile": "answer_score_profile",
      "judge_type": "final_judge",
      "judge_model": "{{JUDGE_MODEL}}",
      "phase": {{PHASE}},
      "created_at": "{{NOW_ISO_UTC}}",
      "dimensions": {
        "correctness": 0.0,
        "completeness": 0.0,
        "clarity": 0.0,
        "usefulness": 0.0,
        "groundedness": 0.0,
        "specificity": 0.0
      },
      "overall_score": 0.0,
      "confidence_band": "medium",
      "notes": ""
    }
  ],
  "judge": {
    "judge_type": "final_judge",
    "judge_model": "{{JUDGE_MODEL}}",
    "judge_version": "1.0"
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source_inputs": ["question_preview", "prior_assistant_response"],
    "source_object_ids": ["{{QUESTION_ID}}", "{{RESPONSE_OBJECT_ID}}"]
  },
  "promotion": {
    "memory_eligible": false,
    "memory_tier": null,
    "promotion_reason": null,
    "blocked_reason": null,
    "effective_score": 0.0
  },
  "links": {
    "repo_path": "evaluations/eval_{{JOB_ID}}.json",
    "index_path": "indexes/evaluations_index.jsonl",
    "source_paths": [],
    "related_object_ids": ["{{QUESTION_ID}}", "{{RESPONSE_OBJECT_ID}}"],
    "evaluation_path": "evaluations/eval_{{JOB_ID}}.json",
    "final_path": null
  }
}
